findings.description: North Carolina state seal/logo at top of page 1 is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 displays a prominent North Carolina state seal between the header names. The HTML rendering has no corresponding image element.

findings.description: DEQ logo/emblem at bottom of page 1 is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 footer area shows a DEQ organizational logo/seal to the left of the address block. The HTML renders only the text portion of the footer without the logo image.

findings.description: Handwritten signature of Judith A. Wehner is missing from the HTML conversion.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 shows a handwritten signature above the printed name 'Judith A. Wehner'. The HTML version shows only 'Sincerely,' followed by the printed name with no signature image.

findings.description: The PDF contains three substantive images — the North Carolina state seal (top of page 1), the NC DEQ logo (bottom of page 1), and a handwritten signature of Judith A. Wehner (page 4) — none of which have corresponding tags in the HTML.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 top: NC state seal/coat of arms. PDF page 1 bottom: NC DEQ department logo. PDF page 4: handwritten signature reading 'Judith A. Wehner'. The HTML has zero tags.
